description: Ad copywriting frameworks for video script generation. Each framework defines AIDA block structure + tone. Used by Dreami (Creative Director) to generate structured scripts.

ugc_testimonial.name: UGC Testimonial
ugc_testimonial.description: Authentic-sounding first-person testimonial. Natural, unscripted feel.

block_structure.label: hook
block_structure.description: Relatable pain/frustration in first person

block_structure.label: discovery
block_structure.description: How they found the product

block_structure.label: experience
block_structure.description: Using the product — sensory details, emotions

block_structure.label: result
block_structure.description: Before/after transformation or outcome

block_structure.label: cta
block_structure.description: Natural recommendation + where to buy

prompt_rules: First person only — 'I' not 'we' or 'they'
Include one specific sensory detail (taste, texture, smell)
Name a real pain point before the product
End with casual recommendation, not hard sell
Malaysian English / Manglish acceptable

pas.name: Problem-Agitate-Solution
pas.description: Classic PAS framework. Amplify the pain, then offer relief.

block_structure.label: problem
block_structure.description: State the problem — make viewer nod

block_structure.label: agitate
block_structure.description: Amplify the pain — consequences of not solving

block_structure.label: solution_intro
block_structure.description: Introduce the product as the answer

block_structure.label: solution_proof
block_structure.description: Show the product working — proof of solution

block_structure.label: cta
block_structure.description: Urgency CTA — limited time, order now

prompt_rules: Problem must be specific and relatable to target audience
Agitate with emotional consequences, not just logical ones
Solution transition should feel like relief, not a pitch
Include social proof if possible (numbers, reviews)
CTA should create urgency without being pushy

slap.name: Stop-Look-Act-Purchase
slap.description: Fast-paced attention-grabbing format. Hook hard, show fast, close quick.

block_structure.label: stop
block_structure.description: Scroll-stopping visual or statement

block_structure.label: look
block_structure.description: Product beauty shot — make them want to see more

block_structure.label: act
block_structure.description: Show product in use — quick cuts, energy

block_structure.label: purchase
block_structure.description: Promo + CTA — flash deal, link in bio

prompt_rules: First 2 seconds MUST have movement or surprise
No slow builds — get to product within 5 seconds
Quick cuts preferred — 1-2s per shot
Text overlays for key claims (not just voiceover)
Promo should feel like a flash deal, not a lecture

emotional_storytelling.name: Emotional Storytelling
emotional_storytelling.description: Narrative arc that builds emotional connection. Longer format, deeper impact.

block_structure.label: setup
block_structure.description: Character introduction — relatable situation

block_structure.label: conflict
block_structure.description: The struggle or challenge they face

block_structure.label: discovery
block_structure.description: Finding the product — the turning point

block_structure.label: transformation
block_structure.description: The change — visual before/after journey

block_structure.label: new_life
block_structure.description: Living the transformed life — aspiration

block_structure.label: cta
block_structure.description: Soft CTA — 'start your journey'

prompt_rules: Must have a clear narrative arc (beginning, middle, end)
Character must be relatable to target audience
Emotional peak should be at the transformation moment
Music/mood should shift with the story arc
CTA should feel like invitation, not instruction
